notes: Header column labelled '.+72 hours' actually holds a '1hr before onsale (08.05.26, 9am local)' figure per the sheet's own column note, not a true +72h EDP mark; mapped that value to a '1hr_pre_onsale' key instead of '72' to avoid mislabeling. Source columns list city before country (Barcelona/Spain) - normalized to standard city/country fields.

notes: Sheet uses date-range windows (25.01.26-01.02.26, 01.02.26-02.02.26 Grammys, 02.02.26-07.02.26, 08.02.26-09.02.26 before additional-seat release) instead of hour-since-onsale buckets, tracking views before/after an additional-seat release announcement (not a standard onsale). Keys are descriptive window labels rather than hours. ADP overall taken from TM_ES market row (venue market). Header row's column order literally lists 'country' before 'city' but data places city name before country name (e.g. 'Barcelona | Spain'); city/country swapped in source header vs data - corrected here (city=Barcelona, country=ES). Flagged anomaly for header/data column-order mismatch.

EDP/ADP tracked since announcement Thu 26 Feb 2PM GMT/3PM CET. ADP figure listed under TM_IE column. presale_peak_queue = ASU (Artist Sign Up) presale T-0 queue value (552 total observed across stages; using General Sale T-0=90 for onsale_peak_queue, and Contractual Presale T-0=47 as presale_peak_queue - see notes on multi-stage queue data). A separate '3Arena Mon Aug 10' row is marked ROLL DATE (moved to this date) and not counted separately.

ADP figure listed under TM_UK column. Queue data: ASU Presale T-0=1487 (used as presale_peak_queue, highest queue stage for this show); ticketing partly 'via AXS' per Contractual Presale row (358 sessions) and a separate AXS-only row shows 655 at T-0. General Sale T-0=235 used as onsale_peak_queue. A second O2 London show (Fri Aug 14) is marked ROLL DATE and not counted separately.
